creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  - Update to 0.8.8

Modified: head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:46:29 2013	(r317818)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:49:42 2013	(r317819)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	salt-cloud
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.8
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

+@@ -145,8 +145,8 @@

            'saltcloud': ['deploy/*.sh'],
-           },

                    ],
        scripts=['scripts/salt-cloud'],
-       **setup_kwargs
+       cmdclass={
